name: Lifestealer
description: Oh Master, behold all these lives for the taking!

abilities.name: Rage
abilities.description: Grants bonus movement speed, bonus magic resistance, and debuff immunity for the entire duration. Move Speed Bonus: 6%/9%/12%/15%. Magic Resist Bonus: 80%. Duration: 3/4/5/6 (4/5/6/7). Cooldown: 20/19/18/17. Mana Cost: 80/100/120/140.

abilities.name: Open Wounds
abilities.description: Rends the unit-targeted enemy, slowing the its movement speed and allowing all allied units to regain health for a percentage of the damage dealt to debuff-affected unit. Lifesteals from all damage instances dealt, including spell damage. Grants all attacking units bonus attack speed on the Open Wounds-affected enemy unit. Cast Range: 300/400/500/600. Damage as Lifesteal: 20%/30%/40%/50% (45%/55%/65%/75%). Duration: 7. Number of Instances: 8. Number of Max Slow Instances: 2. Number of Min Slow Instances: 3. Cooldown: 30/25/20/15. Mana Cost: 90.

abilities.name: Feast
abilities.description: Deals damage and lifesteals for a percentage of the target's max health. Grants a lesser max health bonus stack per enemy creep killed. Max Health as Lifesteal: 1.45%/2.05%/2.65%/3.25% (2.45%/3.05%/3.65%/4.25%). Max Health as Damage: 1.45%/2.05%/2.65%/3.25%. (2.45%/3.05%/3.65%/4.25%). Max Health Bonus per Hero Kill: 10. Max Health Bonus per Creep Kill: 1.

abilities.name: Infest
abilities.description: Grants the Infest-affected allied unit certain ability bonuses. Enables casting Infest on enemy heroes. However, the affected enemy is not granted any of the ability bonuses. Increases cast range, the health regeneration rate, and reduces cooldown. Cast Range: 150 (500). Max Health as Health Regen Bonus: 3%/4%/5% (6%/8%/10%). Target Max Health Bonus: 400/800/1200 (448/896/1344). Target Move Speed Bonus: 15%/20%/25% (27%/32%/37%). Creep Max Health Loss per Second: 1.5%/0.75%/0%. Cooldown: 80/65/50. Mana Cost: 100/125/150.
